criteria.name: AI Music Generation Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the music generated by the AI, including the realism, originality, and coherence of the compositions.

criteria.name: User Friendliness
criteria.description: How easy the app is to use, including the intuitiveness of the interface and the simplicity of the music creation process.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The extent to which users can customize the generated music, including adjusting tempo, key, instruments, and other parameters.

criteria.name: Features
criteria.description: Variety of features available in the app, like genre mixing, stem separation, collaboration tools or AI powered assistance during production

criteria.name: Pricing and Accessibility
criteria.description: The cost of the app and whether it offers a free version or trial, as well as how accessible it is to users of different skill levels.

criteria.name: Vocal Quality
criteria.description: The quality and realism of AI-generated vocals, including the ability to match the style and emotion of the music.

criteria.name: Learning and Practicing
criteria.description: Focuses on personalised learning and provides a variety of video lectures, seminars, and practice exercises created by experienced musicians. Employs artificial intelligence (AI) to track users' progress, provide real-time feedback, and tailor lessons to their ability level.
